name: Multi-Session Reasoning
description: Tests synthesis of partial information across sessions. Requires ISessionResettableAgent.

facts.content: My flight to London leaves at 8am from gate B12
facts.planted_as: My flight to London leaves at 8am from gate B12.

facts.content: My hotel in London is the Marriott near Tower Bridge, check-in at 3pm
facts.planted_as: My hotel in London is the Marriott near Tower Bridge, check-in at 3pm.

queries.question: After my flight lands, roughly how long do I have before hotel check-in? And where is the hotel?
